acceptance.metric: 1. Production recording/library upload call path with real on-disk bytes
acceptance.baseline: Auth/upload clients existed but had zero production app call sites.
acceptance.after: Capture finish and Replays library both feed UploadQueue; the URLProtocol integration test exercises createClip -> two part PUTs with a simulated 503 retry -> completeClip -> exact on-disk sidecar PUT -> GET /api/clips, and passes.
acceptance.target: Production call path through PresignedUploadClient with real video+sidecar bytes and no fixture shortcut.

acceptance.metric: 2. Signed-out recording with auth gate enabled
acceptance.baseline: dinkVisionAuthGateEnabled was false and enabling the old root gate would hide the shell.
acceptance.after: dinkVisionAuthGateEnabled is true; DinkVisionLaunchAccessState keeps Record and local Replays reachable while signed out and gates only upload; focused AppFlow test type-checks.
acceptance.target: Record tab reachable signed out without an auth-bypass launch argument.

acceptance.baseline: No queue or per-package upload_state.json existed.
acceptance.after: Seven UploadQueue tests pass: queued/uploading/uploaded, exact sidecar, failed+retry preserving clip_id, relaunch resume, strict two-capture serialization, contextual auth gate, base URL precedence, and URLProtocol 5xx retry coverage.
acceptance.target: queued -> uploading -> uploaded; failed -> retry with clip_id; relaunch resume; one capture at a time.

acceptance.baseline: CameraRollVideoImporter existed but was unreachable from app UI.
acceptance.after: Replays exposes a videos-only PHPickerViewController, stages the provider URL, calls CameraRollVideoImporter.importVideo, reloads CaptureLibrary, and renders the imported item with the same Upload action; focused App coordinator wiring test type-checks and package importer tests pass.
acceptance.target: Picker -> importer -> library row -> uploadable package.

acceptance.baseline: Test tapped removed Open Camera control.
acceptance.after: Test cold-launches the default Record tab, finds DinkVisionRecordButton by identifier, and verifies Start recording/Stop recording labels; all AppUITests type-check with 0 errors and WorldViewerUITests is unchanged.
acceptance.target: Current-shell device-oriented test compiles without weakening WorldViewerUITests.

acceptance.baseline: Python: 124 passed, 0 failed. Exact Swift command: sandbox ModuleCache denial before test discovery.
acceptance.after: Python: 124 passed, 0 failed, 0 new failures. Exact Swift command remains sandbox-blocked; the allowed fallback parsed all 14 touched Swift files with 0 errors, and the sandbox-compatible full package run executed 234 tests: 233 passed, 1 skipped, 0 failed.
acceptance.target: Swift package green or documented sandbox fallback with 0 parse errors; named pytest suites green with 0 new failures.

changes: ios/App/AppFlow.swift:15 — added the testable signed-out local-access/auth-at-upload policy.

ios/App/AppRootView.swift:18 — enabled auth, kept the record-first shell signed-out, wired recording/library uploads, replay chips/clip_id/retry, import UI, polling, Profile sign-in, and default-off auto-upload.
ios/App/CameraRollVideoPicker.swift:8 — added videos-only PHPicker staging and CameraRollVideoImporter coordination.
ios/App/CaptureViewModel.swift:32 — publishes the actual completed CameraRecordingResult into the production upload route.
ios/App/DinkVisionRuntimeConfiguration.swift:28 — resolves and threads the runtime API base URL into AuthApiClient, PresignedUploadClient, and RenderGatewayClient and builds the upload coordinator.
ios/App/DinkVisionUploadCoordinator.swift:6 — owns auth-at-upload prompting, restart resume, queue monitoring, persisted state presentation, retry, and honest status refresh.
ios/App/Info.plist:5 — declares DINKVISION_API_BASE_URL with the unchanged Render default.
ios/AppTests/AppFlowTests.swift:6 — proves signed-out Record/local Replays remain reachable with the auth gate on.
ios/AppTests/UploadWiringTests.swift:9 — covers all-client base-URL threading and picker-to-uploadable-item importer wiring.
ios/AppUITests/RecordStopUITests.swift:15 — retargets the device-oriented test to the cold-launch Record tab and DinkVisionRecordButton labels.
ios/Upload/Sources/PickleballUpload/AuthApiClient.swift:49 — exposes the injected base URL for wiring verification.

ios/Upload/Sources/PickleballUpload/PresignedUploadClient.swift:78 — adds observable base URL, bounded retry for transient part 5xx/URL errors, part progress, GET /api/clips, and UploadQueueClient conformance.
ios/Upload/Sources/PickleballUpload/RenderGatewayClient.swift:180 — exposes the injected base URL for wiring verification.
ios/Upload/Sources/PickleballUpload/UploadQueue.swift:131 — new serial actor and upload_state.json contract; UploadQueue lives here. BEST-STACK DELTA: (c) No stack delta — product-route wiring.
ios/Upload/Tests/PickleballUploadTests/UploadQueueTests.swift:5 — adds seven focused state/auth/base-URL/serial/integration tests using fakes and URLProtocol only, never the live service.
runs/lanes/upload_wiring_20260709/verification.json:1 — records baseline/after commands, counts, type-checks, and the physical-device boundary.

full_suite.command: swift test --package-path ios --scratch-path .build-laneB (sandbox-blocked before discovery); HOME=$PWD/.swift-home CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=$PWD/.build-laneB/ModuleCache SWIFTPM_MODULECACHE_OVERRIDE=$PWD/.build-laneB/ModuleCache swift test --disable-sandbox --package-path ios --scratch-path .build-laneB; xcrun swiftc -parse on all 14 touched Swift files; MPLBACKEND=Agg .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ios tests/server tests/render_service -q
full_suite.failure_notes: The exact Swift invocation cannot reach test discovery because the managed sandbox denies writes to ~/.cache/clang/ModuleCache. Per the spec fallback, all 14 touched Swift files parse with 0 errors. Additionally, the full package suite executes 234 tests with 233 passed, 1 skipped, and 0 failed under --disable-sandbox and workspace-local caches. Python passes 124/124, unchanged from baseline.

honest_issues: No physical iPhone claim: only a real device can prove camera/microphone recording, the produced sidecar/package, PHPicker behavior, Keychain-backed sign-in, foreground upload interruption behavior, and the final accessibility taps. This remains manager/NS-01.2b verification.

The exact mandated SwiftPM command is infrastructure-blocked before discovery by the managed sandbox; the manager must rerun the normal command plus simulator build and UITest compile outside this sandbox.

Job submission remains intentionally out of scope while the queue is dark. The app queries GET /api/clips verbatim and shows Uploaded — processing not started for server status uploaded with no job_id; it never fabricates processing or ready.
Upload v1 uses foreground URLSession. Background URLSession persistence is a follow-up.

The fixed server API has no same-clip re-presign endpoint. In-process retry preserves clip_id; a crash/relaunch recovery may create a replacement server clip and updates the persisted clip_id honestly.
Tests use injected fakes/URLProtocol and never the live Render service, as required; live accounts-enabled auth/upload is still manager verification.
The required report and verification artifact exist under runs/lanes/upload_wiring_20260709/, but runs/* is gitignored; the manager must force-add them if they should enter the commit.
next: - 2026-07-09 handoff: manager reruns swift test, xcodebuild simulator build, AppTests, and AppUITest compile outside the sandbox; then flips PICKLEBALL_ACCOUNTS_ENABLED=1 and performs the bounded real-device record/import -> upload -> GET /api/clips identity trace without claiming GPU/job/replay completion. Follow-ups: background URLSession, job submission/status routing when the queue un-darks, and cleanup/abandon handling for replacement re-presigns. BEST-STACK DELTA: (c) No stack delta — product-route wiring.
